expendables.name: Expendables
expendables.description: Your minions are Sapient, speak a language, and can use Equipment, Artifacts, and Consumables. They cannot Exert their Mind. Their Attack dice only apply Grapples, Dodges, and one type of attack or weapon. For all other Actions, they roll 3 dice.
expendables.eratta: Attack type / weapon examples: “unarmed,” “firearms”, “melee”. Standard Damage bonus only applies to unarmed Attacks. Minions immediately die if an Artifact or Consumable they use would Injure them or cause them to roll Trauma.

substitutions.replacement: Your minions roll ##minion-mind-rating++ Mind resistance dice.
Sapient
and can speak your language.
Minions have human-level intelligence
They can use equipment, Artifacts, and Consumables. However, they cannot Exert their Mind.
unarmed
Any other roll is made with ##minion-general-action-dice,minion-bonus-dice++ dice.
[[companion-use-artifacts | Minions die if targeted with Energy Transfer (before the Effect resolves) or if an Artifact or Consumable they use would Injure them or cause them to roll Trauma.]]

too-darn-fast.name: Too Darn Fast
too-darn-fast.description: You may Exert your Mind and spend a Reaction to automatically dodge any incoming Attack. When you do so, you may move up to 35 feet.

substitutions.replacement: You may Exert your Mind and spend a Reaction to automatically dodge any incoming Attack. When you do so, you may move up to 35 feet.

commercial-flight.name: Pixie Dust
commercial-flight.description: You may grant flight and fly with an additional person at no penalty. Those whom you grant flight to can fly at your speed if touching you or Mind x5 feet/Round if on their own. If they do not touch you for two Rounds, they fall.

substitutions.replacement: Pixie Dust: You may grant flight and fly with up to ##total-passengers++ others at no penalty. Those whom you grant flight to can fly at your speed if touching you or Mind x5 feet/Round if on their own. If they do not touch you for two Rounds, they fall.

dual-wielding-melee.name: Two Swords are Better than One
dual-wielding-melee.description: If you are wielding more than one melee weapon, you Attack with all using the highest Weapon Damage, plus 1 for each additional weapon. Any Clash or Defend roll you make is -1 Difficulty, and mob penalties are ignored.
dual-wielding-melee.eratta: Maximum +5 Damage from bonus weapons. When you deal Damage via a Clash, you deal the highest weapon Damage without the multi weapon bonus.

substitutions.replacement: You also gain the following effects:

Two Swords are better than One:If you are wielding more than one melee weapon, you Attack with all using the highest Weapon Damage, plus 1 for each additional weapon. Any Clash or Defend roll you make is -1 Difficulty, and mob penalties are ignored. Maximum +5 Damage from bonus weapons. Clashes deal highest weapon Damage without the bonus.

quick-change.name: Quick Change
quick-change.description: Your transformation is nearly instant. Instead of requiring a full Action, you may activate this Effect as a Quick Action.

substitutions.replacement: spend a Quick Action

group-therapy.name: Mass Hysteria
group-therapy.description: You may target a number of individuals equal to your Charisma rating.

substitutions.replacement: affected targets
Select a number of @@target-living,target-sapient,target-animate,target-alien%% targets equal to your Charisma [[activation-range]] [[target-size]].

sensei.name: Sensei
sensei.description: You may Exert your Mind and spend 1 minute teaching an Ability to up to 5 people. Roll Charisma + Performance, Difficulty 7. For the next three hours, their rating in that Ability is increased by your Outcome to a maximum of your rating in it.

substitutions.replacement: You also gain the following effects:

Sensei: You may Exert your Mind and spend 1 minute teaching an Ability to up to 5 people. Roll Charisma + Performance, Difficulty 7. For the next three hours, their rating in that Ability is increased by your Outcome to a maximum of your rating in it.

hyde.name: Hyde
hyde.description: While transformed, all Trauma rolls and Mind Damage resulting from crossing your Limits are delayed until you return to your original form. The first time you cross a Limit while transformed, you recover one Source or Mind Damage.

substitutions.replacement: While transformed, all Trauma rolls and Mind Damage resulting from crossing your Limits are delayed until you return to your original form. The first time you cross a Limit while transformed, you recover one Source or Mind Damage.

thorns.name: Thorns
thorns.description: When this Armor prevents Damage from a source which is within 5 feet, it deals back as much Damage as it prevented.
thorns.eratta: Conditional Armor bonuses from this Effect do not apply.

substitutions.replacement: When this Armor prevents Damage from a source which is within 5 feet, it deals back as much Damage as it prevented. Maximum [[extra-armor]] Damage.

couch-jockey.name: Couch Jockey
couch-jockey.description: You may hack targets that are out of range via a network as long as they present an authentication interface to you. Attempts to hack targets with Alien security in this way are made at +2 Difficulty.
couch-jockey.eratta: You may target via a network if the target typically presents a human-usable authentication interface via that network. For example, websites and intranet services. Network hacking generally requires a Computer of your own and a connection to the relevant network.

substitutions.replacement: You may target via a network if the target typically presents a human-usable authentication interface via that network. For example, websites and intranet services are likely targets, but phones and personal computers do not typically allow remote login unless specially configured.
Network hacking generally requires a Computer of your own and a connection to the relevant network. Not all networks are connected to the internet or offer wireless connections.
Hacking out-of-range targets via a network is done at +2 Difficulty.
Alternatively, you may select a target that is out of range but accessible via a network as long as it presents an authentication interface to you.
Attempts to hack via a network do not necessarily appear Alien.

luddite.name: Luddite
luddite.description: You may target Constructs, Sapient Objects, and non-living Animate targets. Any Sapient targets may roll Mind at Difficulty 7 to resist. You deal Damage equal to double the Contested Outcome.

substitutions.replacement: When targeting something Animate, you deal Damage equal to double the Contested Outcome. You must "kill" the target to destroy it.
Sapient targets may resist by rolling Mind at Difficulty 7.
Non-living Animate
Construct
Object

imprision.name: Imprison
imprision.description: If your target is encased and does not escape within 3 Rounds, they cannot ever free themselves and must be rescued. The method of rescue must be obvious to anyone who sees them.
imprision.eratta: The method of rescue must be simple and achievable by any able-bodied person. The 3 Round timer starts from the most recent activation of this Effect.

substitutions.replacement: If your target is encased and does not escape within 3 Rounds, they cannot ever free themselves and must be rescued by $.

It is obvious that an imprisoned target can be rescued by $. The method of rescue must be simple and achievable by any able-bodied person. The 3 Round timer starts from the most recent activation of this Effect.

the-method.name: The Method
the-method.description: You may roll Charisma + Performance to resist any Alien investigation Effects that target you. If the incoming Effect fails, the investigator receives information consistent with your Disguise.

substitutions.replacement: You may roll Charisma + Performance to resist any Alien investigation Effects that target you. If the incoming Effect fails, the investigator receives information consistent with your Disguise.

paint-target.name: Paint Target
paint-target.description: You may spend an Action and Exert your Mind to paint a marked target. When you do, the target becomes visually clear for one minute. During this time, the target is at +2 Difficulty to hide, and any rolls anyone makes against the target get +2 dice.
paint-target.eratta: Your marked target must be in line of sight. Painted Target Appearance examples: "their tattoo glows brightly", "innumerable laser pointers from nowhere shine on them", "a ray of light follows them", etc

substitutions.replacement: You may spend an Action and Exert your Mind to paint a marked target. When you do, for one minute, the target becomes visually clear and $. During this time, the target is at +2 Difficulty to hide, and any rolls anyone makes against the target get +2 dice.

multiple-shields.name: Multiple Shields
multiple-shields.description: You may select up to 3 targets each time you activate this Effect.
multiple-shields.eratta: If paired with Bubble Shield, any shields with intersecting areas are considered one contiguous Bubble Shield, and Attacks from one to the other are not affected.

substitutions.replacement: up to 3
targets
Any shields with intersecting areas are considered one contiguous Bubble Shield, and Attacks from one to the other are not affected.

induce-panic.name: Soul Twist
induce-panic.description: The target loses your Contested Outcome in Source. Once their Source is depleted, excess Outcome is applied as Mind Damage. They receive a new Trauma if and only if you deal at least 3 Mind damage.
induce-panic.eratta: The formation of a new Trauma in this way does not cause additional Mind damage.

substitutions.replacement: [[succeed-grammar-override | If the Contested Outcome is positive]], the [[multi-grammar | target]] loses that much Source. Once their Source is depleted, excess Outcome is applied as Mind Damage. If you deal at least 3 Mind damage, the [[multi-grammar | target]]

resilient-mind.name: Resilient
resilient-mind.description: Stress doesn’t apply to resistance rolls you make.

substitutions.replacement: You also gain the following effects:
Stress doesn’t apply to any Mind or Body resistance rolls you make.

pin.name: Pin
pin.description: If one of your Attacks injures its target, you may leave your weapon and pin them in place. Safely removing the weapon costs an Action. If they move before removing it, the Injury’s Severity worsens by 2. Using a Quick Action worsens it by 1.
pin.eratta: You cannot worsen the Injury by removing the weapon yourself until the following Round.

substitutions.replacement: You also gain the following effects:

Pin: If one of your Attacks injures its target, you may leave your weapon and pin them in place. Safely removing the weapon costs an Action. If they move before removing it, the Injury’s Severity worsens by 2. Using a Quick Action worsens it by 1. You cannot worsen the Injury by removing the weapon yourself until the following Round.

traffic.name: Traffic
traffic.description: You learn how heavily trafficked the general area is, what sorts of Animate beings have moved through the area and roughly how long ago. You cannot determine precise locations or times nor track the movement of specific individuals.

substitutions.replacement: You learn how heavily trafficked the general area is, what sorts of Animate beings have moved through the area and roughly how long ago. You cannot determine precise locations or times nor track the movement of specific individuals.

dominion.name: Dominion
dominion.description: If you maintain this Effect in a given area for a week, its duration becomes indefinite. It ends only when you choose to end it or die.

substitutions.replacement: If you maintain this Effect in a given area for a week, its duration becomes indefinite. It ends only when you choose to end it or die.

suppress-smell.name: Suppress Smell
suppress-smell.description: The zone is blocked from scent and taste. No meaningful scents or tastes escape the zone or can be perceived inside the zone. Rolls that rely on smell or taste fail automatically, and rolls that normally benefit from smell or taste are at -3 dice.

substitutions.replacement: Suppressed Smell: The zone is blocked from scent and taste. No meaningful scents or tastes escape the zone or can be perceived inside the zone. Rolls that rely on smell or taste fail automatically, and rolls that normally benefit from smell or taste are at -3 dice.

counterhacking.name: Counterhacking
counterhacking.description: All Alien attempts to hack a system you secured take at least 1 minute. If you can access the target, you may maintain Concentration and counterhack to pause the attempt for up to an hour, and your system’s security roll gets +1 Outcome.

substitutions.replacement: All Alien attempts to hack a system you secured take at least 1 minute. If you can access the target, you may maintain Concentration and counterhack to pause the attempt for up to an hour, and your system’s security roll gets +1 Outcome.

drain-attribute.name: Drain Attribute
drain-attribute.description: You may transfer an Attribute between targets. The giver suffers a penalty of up to -3 dice to all rolls using that Attribute, capped at their rating. The receiver gets the same dice as a bonus to all rolls using the Attribute. Lasts two hours.
drain-attribute.eratta: Transferred Attribute ratings do NOT affect Body or Mind scores but DO affect Body and Mind rolls if a relevant Attribute has been drained, as well as encumbrance, movement, and other mechanics related to the Attribute in question. Dice bonuses and penalties from multiple activations do not stack.

substitutions.replacement: Up to 3 points of an Attribute. Lasts 2 hours. The giver suffers a penalty of up to -3 dice to all rolls using that Attribute, capped at their rating. The receiver gets the same dice as a bonus to all rolls using the Attribute.

Transferred Attribute ratings do NOT affect Body or Mind scores but DO affect Body and Mind rolls if a relevant Attribute has been drained, as well as encumbrance, movement, and other mechanics related to the Attribute in question. Dice bonuses and penalties from multiple activations do not stack.
Dice bonuses from this Effect are treated normally and do not stack with dice bonuses from any other source.

combat-ready.name: Combat-Ready
combat-ready.description: You do not suffer any dice penalties from Stress while in your alternate form. When you revert to your normal form, your Stress is increased by 3 for one hour and cannot be decreased through any other means.
combat-ready.eratta: Exerting for bonus Outcome still allows you to ignore Stress for your Action.

substitutions.replacement: You do not suffer any dice penalties from Stress while in your alternate form. When you revert to your normal form, your Stress is increased by 3 for one hour and cannot be decreased through any other means. Exerting for bonus Outcome still allows you to ignore Stress for your Action

flat-rate-box.name: Flat Rate Box
flat-rate-box.description: You may Exert your Mind to send any physical Object that would fit into a backpack with your message. Takes 1 minute to arrive. Any active traps on the objects are triggered when you attempt to send them, and wards and marks are likewise removed.

substitutions.replacement: You may [[consumable-use | Exert your Mind]] to send any physical Object that would fit into a backpack with your message. Takes 1 minute to arrive. Any active traps on the objects are triggered when you attempt to send them, and wards and marks are likewise removed.

instant-karma.name: Instant Karma
instant-karma.description: If you successfully resist an Effect with your Mind, you may reflect it back to another target as though you had cast it.
instant-karma.eratta: If reflecting back at the original source, the Effect’s activation Outcome is the Contested Outcome of your resistance, and the target does not get a Resistance roll. If reflecting to a third party, the Effect’s activation Outcome is the original activation's Outcome, and the target receives a resistance roll.

substitutions.replacement: Instant Karma: If you successfully resist an Effect with your Mind, you may reflect it back to another target as though you had cast it.
You also gain the following effects:

If reflecting back at the original source, the Effect’s activation Outcome is the Contested Outcome of your resistance, and the target does not get a Resistance roll. If reflecting to a third party, the Effect’s activation Outcome is the original activation's Outcome, and the target receives a resistance roll.

polar-opposites.name: Polar Opposites
polar-opposites.description: Specify one of your Attributes with a rating of 1 and one with a base rating of 5. While you are transformed, the Attribute at rating 1 is increased to a base rating of 5 and the Attribute at rating 5 is set to 1.
polar-opposites.eratta: You must have purchased the fifth level of the rating-5 Attribute with Experience. You may use your one Mythic Attribute on either, but its benefits are only available when the relevant Attribute’s base rating is 5. Transformed or not, the lower of the two chosen Attributes cannot be increased by any means other than the ones outlined in this Enhancement.

substitutions.replacement: Polar Opposites: You must have purchased the fifth level of the rating-5 Attribute with Experience. You may use your one Mythic Attribute on either, but its benefits are only available when the relevant Attribute’s base rating is 5. Transformed or not, the lower of the two chosen Attributes cannot be increased by any means.
The Attributes $ are polar opposites for you. When you are transformed, the one that is normally at rating 1 is set to a base of 5, and the one with a base rating of 5 is set to 1.

conduit-seasoned-cooldown.name: Voodoo Doll
conduit-seasoned-cooldown.description: This Effect has unlimited range, but you must use up a token of your target to do so. One activation per target per day. The chosen token must be an object that the target actively created or that was in the target’s possession for at least 24 hours.
conduit-seasoned-cooldown.eratta: For example, a sample of the target’s blood, an object of sentimental value to the target, a sample of the target’s handwriting, a drop of the target’s blood, a corpse of someone the target killed, a piece of art created by the target, etc.

substitutions.replacement: Activation requires possession of the target's $, which is used up during the process. You cannot target the same target more than once per day.
at any range

lifesaver.name: Lifesaver
lifesaver.description: Anyone protected by this armor may use Will to Survive exactly one more time than they normally could per Contract. This does not stack, and you cannot use Will To Survive more than once per Injury.
lifesaver.eratta: Non-Contractors protected by this Armor may use Will to Survive once per Contract. Contractors can use Will to Survive twice per Contract.

substitutions.replacement: Anyone protected by this armor may use Will to Survive exactly one more time than they normally could per Contract. This does not stack, and you cannot use Will To Survive more than once per Injury.

puppeteer.name: Puppeteer
puppeteer.description: When you attempt to start or maintain a Grapple on a target, you may specify a physical Action for them to take. If you succeed, you puppeteer them to take the specified Action using the Contested Outcome. Your TK Grapple is +1 Difficulty to resist.
puppeteer.eratta: You may “spend” Outcome to “walk” them 10 feet per Outcome spent. You must specify the desired Action before you make your Grapple attempt or resist their attempt to break free of the Grapple.

substitutions.replacement: Grappling: When you attempt to start or maintain a Grapple on a target, you may specify a physical Action for them to take. If you succeed, you puppeteer them to take the specified Action using the Contested Outcome. Your TK Grapple is +1 Difficulty to resist. You may “spend” Outcome to “walk” them 10 feet per Outcome spent.

When puppeteering, must specify the desired Action before you make your Grapple attempt or resist their attempt to break free of the Grapple. It happens immediately after the contested roll to determine if the Grapple is made or maintained. Technically, it is your Action.

auto-recovery.name: Recall
auto-recovery.description: If this Artifact is in no one else’s possession, its true owner may Exert their Mind and spend two Actions to bring it to themselves.
auto-recovery.eratta: "Possession" means that someone else has claimed the Artifact and has it on their person or stored it in an area they control.

substitutions.replacement: If this Artifact is in no one else’s possession, its true owner may Exert their Mind and spend two Actions to bring it to themselves.
"Possession" means that someone else has claimed the Artifact and has it on their person or stored it in an area they control.

deep-fake.name: Deep Fake
deep-fake.description: Your disguise can alter your smell, DNA, and other aspects that are not perceivable via human senses. Detection Effects apply to your Disguise instead of your true self, but deep investigative Effects still penetrate your disguise.
deep-fake.eratta: “Deep investigative effects” include Investigate Individual and NPC Effects such as alien autopsies, a psychic probe, a god’s judgement, etc

substitutions.replacement: Your disguise can alter your smell, DNA, and other aspects that are not perceivable via human senses. Detection Effects apply to your Disguise instead of your true self, but deep investigative Effects still penetrate your disguise.
“Deep investigative effects” include Investigate Individual and NPC Effects such as alien autopsies, a psychic probe, a god’s judgement, etc

bloodhound.name: Bloodhound
bloodhound.description: Smell: Your nose is as sensitive as a dog’s. You can recognize familiar smells that are close by, upwind, or where the source has lingered. By sniffing closely, you may identify scents, follow trails, and learn roughly when a familiar smell was left.
bloodhound.eratta: This Gift does not grant a dice bonus, but it grants automatic success for basic smell-related rolls and allows you to attempt certain Alertness and Investigation Actions typical humans cannot.

substitutions.replacement: Smell: Your nose is as sensitive as a dog’s. You can recognize familiar smells that are close by, upwind, or where the source has lingered. By sniffing closely, you may identify scents, follow trails, and learn roughly when a familiar smell was left.

absorb.name: Absorb
absorb.description: If you are aware of an incoming source of Damage, you may Exert your Mind and spend a Reaction to reduce all Damage from that source to 0.
absorb.eratta: “Source of Damage” refers to an Attack, environmental obstacle, Effect, etc. Only prevents one instance of Damage.

substitutions.replacement: You also gain the following effects:
Absorb: If you are aware of an incoming source of Damage, you may Exert your Mind and spend a Reaction to reduce all Damage from that source to 0.
“Source of Damage” on Absorb refers to an Attack, environmental obstacle, Effect, etc. Only prevents one instance of Damage.

time-walk.name: Time Walk
time-walk.description: Specify a particular date and time upon activation. Any part of the area you can perceive, you may choose to view as it was at the selected time. Time in the vision progresses at its normal rate.
time-walk.eratta: You cannot gain additional information from the vision with other Awareness Effects, nor can you target beings though the vision or similar.

substitutions.replacement: You cannot gain additional information from your vision of the past with other Awareness Effects, nor can you target beings though the vision or similar.

Specify [[eye-of-the-past | a particular date and time]] upon activation. Any part of the area you can perceive, you may choose to view as it was at the selected time. Time in the vision progresses at its normal rate.

secure.name: Secure
secure.description: If you already have credentials for your target, you may secure it against unauthenticated access.  Secured targets cannot be used without the appropriate credentials, and all mundane attempts to forge credentials or bypass authentication fail.
secure.eratta: You cannot secure a system beyond your current level of access. The credentials may take any form (biometric scan, a passphrase, etc) as long as the target system is already capable of checking credentials of that type. Anyone with the credentials can authenticate and issue commands through the target’s standard interfaces.

substitutions.replacement: [[hack-secure-base-system]] [[hack-secure-protections]] {{hack-secure-additional-effects}}

technocrat.name: Technocrat
technocrat.description: When you are issuing a command to a target within range that has mundane security, you may opt to issue the same command to any number of targets that are of the same type (e.g. smartphone, camera, desktop computer) within range.
technocrat.eratta: All additional targets must be valid initial targets, and typical visibility requirements apply to each of them.

tractor-beam.name: Tractor Beam
tractor-beam.description: If your target is not Animate, you do not have to Exert your Mind to activate this Effect.

substitutions.replacement: If your target is not Animate, you do not have to Exert your Mind to activate this Effect.

the-blessing.name: The Blessing
the-blessing.description: You may Exert your Mind and spend an Action to give a target within arm’s reach a Battle Scar. As long as they have this scar, they benefit from this Effect.

substitutions.replacement: You may [[consumable-use | Exert your Mind]] and spend an Action to give a target within arm’s reach a Battle Scar. As long as they have this scar, they benefit from this Effect.

gust.name: Gust
gust.description: You may spend an Action and roll Brawn + Athletics to create a powerful gust of wind covering a 35 x 35 foot area in front of you. Affected targets may be disarmed, knocked down, thrown back, and take Damage.
gust.eratta: Affected targets are knocked down if your Outcome is higher than their Dexterity, thrown back 30 feet if higher than their Brawn, disarmed if higher than their weapon’s Ability rating, and take Damage equal to your Outcome minus their Body score. Lightweight things may be thrown far or broken at the GM’s discretion.

impeccable-judgement.description: Once per Contract and Downtime, you may ask one (out of character) yes/no question about someone you are conversing with. The person playing the target must answer truthfully.
impeccable-judgement.eratta: This does not count as an Effect, Alien Investigation, or similar and cannot be resisted.

dimensional-convolution.name: Dimensional Convolution
dimensional-convolution.description: Effects which rely on transdimensional travel or space/time warping cannot be used to enter or leave your zone, and when such Effects are activated within your zone, their targets teleport to a random location within your zone at the GM’s discretion.
dimensional-convolution.eratta: Common examples include the Effects Travel, Stash, and Phase Out. However, certain exceptions for flavors highly divorced from transdimensional travel and space/time manipulation may be exempted at the GM’s discretion.

other-sense.name: Other
other-sense.description: One of your senses is enhanced in a unique way, granting you additional information while it is available.
other-sense.eratta: Requires Playgroup Leader approval. Must also specify a base sense (e.g. “hearing” “sight”). Prefer requiring existing Detect Beings/Objects /Investigate Effects over using this Enhancement.

ju-jitsu.name: Jiu-Jitsu
ju-jitsu.description: When you successfully start or maintain a Grapple, you may choose to deal Damage to the target equal to the Grapple’s Contested Outcome.

disturbing-activation.name: Disturbing
disturbing-activation.description: Witnessing this Effect's Activation is extremely disturbing and/or morally abhorrent to the average person. Anyone who witnesses its activation will almost certainly be repulsed, outraged, and think differently of you from that moment on.
disturbing-activation.eratta: Must go beyond the Effect's innate disturbing-ness. Examples include: transforming into a terrible monster, sacrificing a child, performing torture, etc. Playgroup leaders should account for what is "normal" in their chosen setting. Be cognizant of your group's tone and accommodating to those who would like to "fast forward" through the description.

look-ma-no-hands.name: Look Ma, No Hands
look-ma-no-hands.description: You can’t use equipment with your hands while in the air.

paws.name: Paws
paws.description: You are incapable of fine object manipulation and can only hold or grasp things in a crude, clumsy way.

permanently-transformed.name: Permanently Transformed
permanently-transformed.description: Take this Drawback if you die while under the effects of Soulbound. You have permanently transformed into a possessed object.

substitutions.replacement: an inanimate form
You are permanently transformed into [[ legendary-artifact-name | [[chosen-form]]]]. {{inanimate-passive-extra-effects}}
You can perceive your surroundings as normal, and you may control the functioning of the object you have transformed into (for example, opening your doors if you are a car).
If you are broken, you cannot take any Actions until you are repaired.

If anyone wields, equips, wears, or uses you while you are transformed, you may take physical actions using their body. Your Action comes directly before theirs in Initiative, and all rolls are made with your stats. You may opt to utilize your Action to "help" your host, allowing them to use your dice pool for their chosen Action.

You can use any Powers that do not require movement on your own. You  must be wielded or equipped to use other Powers. You cannot use Artifacts or Consumables, but if you have transformed into a Legendary Artifact, you may use the other Effects attached to it.
While being wielded, any Action that would cause self-harm to your host requires a contested Mind roll.
